id.description: Unique ID for the user (persistent across sessions)

language.description: Language code set for the product for the user (en-us, en-gb, etc.)

country.description:
Country code for the user's location.
Eg. US

region.description:
Region code for the user's location.
Eg. PA

dma.description:
DMA for the user's location.
Eg. 566. Not available outside of the US.

start.description:
Date of the user's first visit.
I.e. Cookie creation date

offset.description:
Valid string of the user's current UTC offset in hh:mm:ss format.
Ex. -05:00 or 05:00
